title: Bulgarian Grammar Lab
description: A structured path for learning Bulgarian grammar by person, tense, and common edge cases.

modules.title: Persons and Pronouns
modules.description: Learn the six personal forms, how pronouns work, and when Bulgarian usually drops them.

modules.title: Present Tense Patterns
modules.description: See how regular verbs change across persons and how the common stem patterns behave.

modules.title: Past, Future, and Conditional
modules.description: Practice the major tense builders and compare how each one marks time.

modules.title: Edge Cases and Irregulars
modules.description: Cover irregular forms, tricky nouns, and the exceptions that usually confuse beginners.
